member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.LokkeAppPingResponse
member.summary: Response from the lokke.app ping endpoint used to obtain a Vavoo auth signature.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.LokkeAppPingResponse.AddonSig
member.summary: Gets or sets the addon signature used to authenticate Vavoo stream resolution requests.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooBox2PingResponse
member.summary: Response from the vavoo.tv box/ping2 endpoint (fallback auth).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooBox2PingResponse.Response
member.summary: Gets or sets the inner response object.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooBox2PingInner
member.summary: Inner response from vavoo.tv box/ping2.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooBox2PingInner.Signed
member.summary: Gets or sets the signed token that can be appended to stream URLs as vavoo_auth.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooResolveRequest
member.summary: Request body sent to vavoo.to/mediahubmx-resolve.json.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooResolveRequest.Language
member.summary: Gets or sets the BCP-47 language code.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooResolveRequest.Region
member.summary: Gets or sets the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooResolveRequest.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vavoo stream URL to resolve.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooResolveRequest.ClientVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the client version string.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooResolveItem
member.summary: A single item in a mediahubmx-resolve response list.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooResolveItem.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets the resolved stream URL.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.LokkePingRequest
member.summary: Ping request body for lokke.app.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.LokkePingRequest.Token
member.summary: Gets or sets the app token.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.LokkePingRequest.Reason
member.summary: Gets or sets the trigger reason.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.LokkePingRequest.Locale
member.summary: Gets or sets the locale.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.LokkePingRequest.Theme
member.summary: Gets or sets the theme.

member.summary: Gets or sets device/app metadata.

member.summary: Gets or sets appFocusTime.

member.summary: Gets or sets playerActive.

member.summary: Gets or sets playDuration.

member.summary: Gets or sets devMode.

member.summary: Gets or sets hasAddon.

member.summary: Gets or sets castConnected.

member.summary: Gets or sets the package name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the version.

member.summary: Gets or sets the process.

member.summary: Gets or sets firstAppStart timestamp.

member.summary: Gets or sets lastAppStart timestamp.

member.summary: Gets or sets ipLocation.

member.summary: Gets or sets adblockEnabled.

member.summary: Gets or sets iap.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooChannel
member.summary: Represents a channel entry returned by the Vavoo.to channels API.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooChannel.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique channel identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooChannel.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel display name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooChannel.Country
member.summary: Gets or sets the country the channel belongs to.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooChannel.Logo
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional channel logo URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.Models.VavooChannel.Category
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional channel category / group.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.VavooApiClient
member.summary: HTTP client for the Vavoo.to API, handling channel listing, authentication, and stream URL resolution.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.VavooApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.VavooApiClient})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.VavooApiClient.GetChannelsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the list of available Vavoo channels, using a timed cache.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.VavooApiClient.ResolveStreamUrlAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves the playback URL for a given channel, attempting authentication via lokke.app first, then falling back to the ping2 token, and finally to the raw stream URL.
member.param: The integer channel ID from the Vavoo channels list.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration for JellyVoo.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.CountryFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets the country filter (e.g. "Poland", "Turkey"). Leave empty to include all countries.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ChannelCacheMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets how long (in minutes) the channel list is cached before refreshing.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.LiveTv.VavooLiveTvService
member.summary: Implements to provide Live TV channels from Vavoo.to.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.LiveTv.VavooLiveTvService.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Api.VavooApiClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.LiveTv.VavooLiveTvService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Plugin
member.summary: The JellyVoo plugin main class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the current plugin instance.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyVoo.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers plugin services with the Jellyfin dependency injection container.
